name: voiceisolate-pro
description: Studio-grade voice isolation platform. 32-stage Octa-Pass DSP pipeline with hybrid ML + classical spectral processing.
author: VoiceIsolate Pro

scripts.build: mkdir -p build && cp -r public/* build/ && cp index.html app.js style.css build/ 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Build complete'
rm -rf build && mkdir build && cp -r public/* build/ && cp index.html style.css app.js build/
mkdir -p build && cp index.html app.js style.css build/ && cp -r public v19-demo build/ || echo 'Static site — no build step'
